zh.Exeter, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特
zh.St Peter's Cathedral Church, Exeter, Dev: 英國戴文艾可謝特聖 比特也斯 凱德拉爾 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Courtenay III於1303年7月12日出生在英國戴文奧可哈普頓時，他的父親Hugh Courtenay II29歲，母親Agnes Saint John28歲。他於1325年8月11日與Margaret de Bohun在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1327年登記服兵役。他去世於1377年5月2日在英國戴文艾可謝特享年73歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特聖 比特也斯 凱德拉爾 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Courtenay III was born on 12 July 1303, in Okehampton, Devon, England, his father, Hugh Courtenay II, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Saint John, was 28. He married Margaret de Bohun on 11 August 1325, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1327. He died on 2 May 1377, in Exeter, Devon, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in St Peter's Cathedral Church, Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Courtenay III est né le 12 juillet 1303, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Courtenay II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Saint John, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Bohun le 11 août 1325, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1327. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1377, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à St Peter's Cathedral Church, Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

August 1325 in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Bohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1327 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 2. Mai 1377 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Exeter, Devon, England und wurde in St Peter's Cathedral Church, Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret de Bohun il 11 agosto 1325, nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1327. Morì il 2 maggio 1377, nel Exeter, Devon, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a St Peter's Cathedral Church, Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Courtenay IIIが1303年7月12日にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Hugh Courtenay IIは29歳，母Agnes Saint Johnは28歳であった。1325年8月11日にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターでMargaret de Bohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年に兵役登録をした。彼は1377年5月2日にイギリスデボンエクセターで73歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセタースト ペテル'ス カスエドラル チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter's Cathedral Church, Exeter, Dev: 영국 데폰 세터 스트 피터'스 캐테드럴 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Courtenay III(이)가 1303년 7월 12일 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Courtenay II(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Saint John(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1325년 8월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 Margaret de Bohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1377년 5월 2일 영국 데폰 세터에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터 스트 피터'스 캐테드럴 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Courtenay III nasceu em 12 de julho de 1303, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Courtenay II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Saint John, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Bohun em 11 de agosto de 1325, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1327. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1377, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em St Peter's Cathedral Church, Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter's Cathedral Church, Exeter, Dev: ст питир'с кэтедраль чурч, эксетир, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Courtenay III родился 12 июля 1303 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Courtenay II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Saint John, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Bohun 11 августа 1325 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1327 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 2 мая 1377 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности ст питир'с кэтедраль чурч, эксетир, девон, Англия.
